headline: Salesforce AI Shift Agentforce Operations Links Product Adoption To Valuation
summary: Salesforce (NYSE:CRM) launched Agentforce Operations, a new tool aimed at automating complex enterprise workflows, alongside rising adoption of its broader Agentforce AI platform. The company is shifting to a new revenue reporting structure that aligns more closely with its AI offerings and how customers are using its products. These moves highlight how AI is becoming central to how Salesforce builds products and explains its business performance. Salesforce, trading at $186.34, is rolling...
